description.unified: Deals M.DMG 7times to nearby enemies within a circular area, then deals M.DMG to enemies in a frontal area and inflicts Down for 1.5sec.

Deals M.DMG to all enemies and inflicts Stun for 0.5sec. Upon casting, enters [Arcane Crystal Awakening] for 10sec, increasing ATK SPD by [15% (all allies)->35% (self)]. While active, releases a shockwave every 1.3sec, dealing M.DMG to nearby enemies.

Summons an Arcane Crystal, dealing M.DMG to enemies in a frontal line, then causes an explosion that deals additional M.DMG. Enemies hit are inflicted with [Arcane Crystal Curse] for 5sec, and when Kirze attacks enemies under [Arcane Crystal Curse], applies stacks of [Arcane Crystal Energy]. [Arcane Crystal Curse]: Reduces ATK SPD by 10%, and after 5sec, deals M.DMG + M.DMG per stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy], then resets all stacks.
Changes base Mana Recovery per sec to 150, increases Crit Chance by [150->250], and increases the duration of CCs that all allies inflict on Bosses by [20%->15%].

light.unified: Increases Mana Cost by [(added) 1000] but increases duration by 4 sec.

dark.unified: Increases ATK SPD by an additional [40% (while active)->35%].

description.unified: [Slash, Blade of Judgment! ] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces Mana Cost by [1->1000].
[Disperse, Crystal Haze!] Increases ATK SPD of all allies by [(added) 10%] and increases DEF Penetration of all allies by [100->{0}].
[End to Evil Deeds!] Increases [Crit Chance by 250 -> Crit DMG by 32%], and changes the CC duration increase effect to {0}%.
